comment.body:
remember what I said about AI content in the welcome email?
i know, most of the members do not keep it. 
...
let me tell you a story from yesterday.

I have economic data subs, but still, i asked AI to collect the US data releases from April (date, expectations, and classify the mif it was a miss or a beat, and give me a list)
even after the 4th prompt it was still inaccurate, it left out datas, it messed up the numbers... it said beat for a miss print... etc.
even tho it is the newest modell.

you know why?
bcs it's just an LLM. it only solves statistical functions, and connect words together.
and regarding this, even a simple task like searching for the datas and copy/paste them and scrutinize via python if the print was higher or 
lower that the expectations + the previous print.. it FAILED.

so I'm asking you: 
Would you trust a model like this collecting my educational threads and provide notes on that (expecting it to understand the jargon, the expressions, the underlying logic and the mathematical connections), instead of your own mind? 

...good old times when LLMs did not exist...
